title: seseli dulce
intro: Seseli dulce, also known as Sweet Masterwort, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region, belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). Traditionally, the plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, making it useful in treating respiratory issues and digestive problems. The health benefits of Seseli dulce include relief from bronchitis, coughs, and colds, as well as reducing inflammation and improving digestion. Seseli dulce is typically prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
